test-method.name: verifyVerificationPageUrl
test-method.description: Precondition: User should be logged in and on the healthapp section 1. Login in the healthapp application 2. Scroll down menu till verification 3. Click on the verification

test-method.name: verifyVerificationSubModules
test-method.description: Precondition: User should be logged in and on the Verification section\n" + "1. Click on the Verification Module drop-down arrow\n" + "2. Click on Order

test-method.name: verifyInventoryTabsAndButtonsAreDisplayed
test-method.description: Precondition: User should be logged in and on the Verification section\n" + "1. Click on the Verification Module drop-down arrow\n" + "2. Click on Inventory + "3. Click on Requisition

test-method.name: verifyPharmacyTabIsActiveOrNot
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on verification module 1. Click on the inventory 2. Click on the pharmacy 3. User should navigate to the pharmacy section from the inventory section

test-method.name: verifyNavigationOfTabs
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on verification module 1. Click on the inventory 2. Click on the pharmacy 3. User should navigate to the pharmacy section from the inventory section

test-method.name: verifyTheResultsDateRangeIsWithinTheSelectedRange
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on Requisition section1. Click on the "From" date2. Select the "From" date3. Click on the "To" date4. Select "To" date5. Click on "OK" button

test-method.name: verifyToolTipText
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on Inventory > Requisition section 1. Hover the mouse over the star/favourite icon. 2. Verify that a tooltip with the text "Remember this date" appears when hovering over the star.

test-method.name: verifyDatesAreRemeberedCorrectly
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on Inventory > Requisition section 1. Hover the mouse over the star/favourite icon. 2. Verify that a tooltip with the text "Remember this date" appears when hovering over the star.

test-method.name: verifyResultDataIsAsPerTheSelectedDateRange
test-method.description: Pre condition: User should be logged in and it is on verification module 1. Click on the data range button 2. Select"one week" option from the drop down 3. Click on "OK" button

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at testcases.verification_testcase.verifyResultDataIsAsPerTheSelectedDateRange(verification_testcase.java:204) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:567) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:227) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:50) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:957) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:200) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1128) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:628) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:830)
